mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE author = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE author = #{userId} AND status = 'completed'
SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_at, updated_at)) FROM tasks WHERE author = #{userId} AND status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(created_at)) FROM tasks WHERE author = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{since}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notes WHERE author = #{userId}
SELECT category as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM tasks WHERE author = #{userId} AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' GROUP BY category
SELECT category as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM notes WHERE author = #{userId} AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' GROUP BY category
